results.title: Unit roster
results.description: Every player unit type laid out in a grid — for at-a-glance differentiation.

results.title: Siege the enemy base
results.description: Player armor + siege column advancing on a walled, turret-defended enemy base.

results.description: A soldier lobbing a grenade with a wall directly in the throw path (blocked-arc preview).

results.description: Enemy armor assaulting a player base fortified with walls and turrets.

results.description: Player force standing, enemy eliminated — the victory report.

results.title: Defeat end screen
results.description: Enemy force standing, player eliminated — the defeat report.
